name: Remove Play Services availability check
description: Stubs GoogleApiAvailability checks so the app never complains about missing Google Play Services.

name: Remove Play Billing dependency
description: Stubs BillingClient so the app works without Google Play Billing.

name: Remove Firebase Analytics dependency
description: Stubs Firebase Analytics so no data is collected.

name: Remove Firebase init provider
description: Stubs FirebaseInitProvider methods via bytecode to prevent auto-initialisation without GMS.

name: Remove all GMS dependencies
description: Comprehensive patch that removes Google Play Services, Play Billing, and Firebase Analytics dependencies.
